reference: I smacked my knee on the side of a door when I tried to open it early this morning, and it has been bothering me the whole day. I can bend it, but it hurts too, and after a while, it hurts to walk. Sometimes my leg falls asleep even though I have only been sitting down for a couple of minutes. Also, every time I go up the stairs and I get up off the couch, my knee hurts a lot. I have been icing it, but I do not know if I should go to the doctor or not. I hit the top of my kneecap.
text: But now, when you want to come before God in the early morning, I want you to be quiet in your mind and your spirit. Be calm in your heart and your mouth, and don't even utter a sound.
